description: A weakness has been identified in code-projects Online Complaint Site 1.0. Impacted is an unknown function of the file /cms/users/complaint-details.php. Executing manipulation of the argument cid can lead to sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be exploited.
